# Review mining ad

## When to use

Use when public reviews reveal pain.

## Why it works

Buyer language comes from real buyers.

## Mechanism

The market writes the copy.

## Required inputs

Extract complaints, turn into hooks.

## When not to use

If reviews are not relevant to your ICP.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

CTR, qualitative resonance, comments.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
